note: Topic seed v3. Supersedes post-topics-seed-v2.json. Changes: (1) credentialing/association topics re-weighted upward to serve the credential-owner association target market from the 2026 Strategy Map (CompTIA, FITSI, USPA, NAEC, APWA, EAPA, ASGE, NAIFA etc.); (2) product-forward topics added for LeverageLearning, Nav Net-30, and test administration, governed by a 4:1 substance-to-product ratio rule enforced at the orchestrator level; (3) audience tags added so the orchestrator can balance content across the two primary target markets.
ratio_rule: For every 5 posts, at most 1 should be product-forward (audience_tag: product). The other 4+ draw from thought-leadership topics. Never schedule two product-forward posts consecutively.
